hero.quote: I don't just write code — I build experiences that matter.

about.title: Who I am
about.bio: My name is Arsen, I'm 19 and I live in Moldova. I love programming — not just the process itself, but the result. When I see a business working, I feel like I'm building something real: architecture, logic, a small but meaningful contribution to society and history. My interests span the philosophy of programming, business logic, cosmology, and science.
about.quote: "The best code is the one that solves a real problem elegantly."

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.text: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Fill out the form and I'll get back to you.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
